opportunities.title: [Hiring] Sales rep to open doors at football clubs, remote UK/EU
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] Sales rep to open doors at football clubs, remote UK/EU

I run a small software company. We help football clubs keep track of the money hiding in player contracts. Appearance bonuses, sell on clauses, promotion triggers. All of it is technically known but nobody models it properly, so it turns up as an unbudgeted six figure payment in March and finance has to explain it. One club is using it now as a design partner. My issue isn't building the thing. It's that the buyer is a club CFO or finance director, there are only a few hundred of them in the entire market, and they ignore people
